name: niclas-skills
description: Personliga Claude-skills för Obsidian, research och bevakning

plugins.name: desktop-commander
plugins.description: MCP server for terminal commands, process management, and file operations across text, code, PDF, DOCX, Excel, images, and structured data

plugins.name: pdf-viewer
plugins.description: View, annotate, and sign PDFs in a live interactive viewer. Mark up contracts, fill forms with visual feedback, stamp approvals, and place signatures — then download the annotated copy.

plugins.name: obsidian-assistant
plugins.description: Teknisk assistent för Obsidian-vaultets Claude-system och Obsidians plugin-API

plugins.name: cowork-plugin-management
plugins.description: Create, customize, and manage plugins tailored to your organization's tools and workflows. Configure MCP servers, adjust plugin behavior, and adapt templates to match how your team works.

plugins.name: clarity
plugins.description: Plain-language explanations of what Claude Code built, changed, or planned — in jargon-free language so non-programmers can understand what happened, why, and what the risks are.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research- och lärande-skills: djup källanalys, kunskapsnoter i Obsidian, källverifiering och Sokratisk inlärning

plugins.name: obsidian-tools
plugins.description: Verktygssuite för Obsidian — skriv noter, bygg Bases-vyer, hämta webbinnehåll och styr vaultet via CLI
